---
title: "Lecture 14 - Generalized Linear Models"
author: "Bill Perry"

execute: 
  collapse: true
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    paged.print: false
    collapse: true
format:
  html:
    downloads: [docx, pptx, typst]  # This creates download links for all three
  # RevealJS - UNCHANGED (keeps your two-column layout and large images)
  revealjs:
    output-ext: "slides.html"
  docx: default
  pptx: default
---
